subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, steadfast leaf! His honor Áqá Mírzá Abu'l-Qásim hath entered the sacred shrine in the utmost spirit and fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه جناب آقا میرزا ابوالقاسم در کمال روح و ریحان وارد بقعه
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
